name: set_mismatch_external_body_false
code:
proof fn phi_1_set_mismatch_external_body_false(s1: Set<nat>, s2: Set<nat>, missing: nat)
    requires
        s1.finite(),
        s2.finite(),
        s1.len() == s2.len(),
        forall |elt| s2.contains(elt) ==> s1.contains(elt),
        s1.contains(missing),
        !s2.contains(missing),
    ensures
        false,
{
    set_mismatch(s1, s2, missing);
}
reason: `set_mismatch` is `external_body` deriving `false` — a contradiction lemma trusted without proof; any error in its preconditions would make the entire system unsound
